purpose: Two-date input with shared calendar. User selects start and end dates. Used for filters like "From – To" or date-range constraints.
whenToUse: Date-range filters (date ranges in lists, reports)
whenNotToUse: For a single date — use DatePicker
For predefined ranges only — use Select with presets
doRules: Use for date range filters (e.g. "From – To")
Provide preset ranges (Last 7 days, This month, etc.) when relevant
Highlight selected range visually in calendar
dontRules: Do not allow end date before start date

layoutGuidance.alignment: Two date displays side-by-side or stacked.

responsiveBehavior.M: Two dates inline; calendar may stack vertically

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Two-step calendar: select start, then end. Arrow keys navigate
Both bounds announced when range changes
